posts.author: ClarissaBrown (Clarissa Brown)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m looking to create an automation with this recipe:

When “Number Column A” changes
and only if “Number Column A” is equal to “Number Column B”,
Then set “Status Column” to “Value”.

But, I’m seeing that I can only enter an amount for Number Column A to be equal (or </>) to, not an option select another number column.

I think it would be really useful if we could create dependencies between number columns. ie. if Number Column A is greater than Number Column B, then do this.

If this feature would be useful to you, please upvote!
